That takes its total funding to $55m. It has already cost several hundred jobs, The Information reported. The driver is fear, and money. That company is Ode with Anthropic, and it launched under its full name this week, the partners said. Its July Patch Tuesday fixed a record haul of flaws, and the company says AI is why the count keeps climbing. The scale is hard to ignore. By Microsoft’s own count, the update patched 622 vulnerabilities.
